title: Organizations
subtitle: Discover and manage your voting communities.
noOrgsFoundDesc: We could not find any organizations matching your search criteria.
joinModalDesc: Enter the 6-character invite code provided by the organization administrator.
createSubtitle: Deploy a new decentralized organization to the blockchain.
smartContractBullet1: Creating an organization deploys a new smart contract.
smartContractBullet2: You will automatically be assigned the Owner role.
whatHappensNextDesc: After creation, you will receive a unique invite code. Share this code with your community members so they can join and participate in elections.
createSuccess: Organization created successfully on the blockchain!
descriptionPlaceholder: What is the purpose of this organization?
shareCodeDesc: Share this code with members you want to invite.
noElectionsYetDesc: This organization has not hosted any elections.
orgSettingsDesc: Update your organization details. Note that some changes require a blockchain transaction.
